title: Refactor SRP-003 (SRP): Data carrier class mixed with serialization and string interpolation logic.

detected_issue.description: Data carrier class mixed with serialization and string interpolation logic.
detected_issue.reasoning: The Event class is the primary data container but also encapsulates: 1) Complex serialization/deserialization logic for JSON, CBOR, and Map formats, 2) String interpolation logic (sprintf), and 3) Metadata management. While it is a core entity, the inclusion of specific third-party mapping logic (Jackson) and interpolation engines violates the principle that a data carrier should be decoupled from its external representations and processing logic.

fix_logic.summary: Extract serialization and string interpolation logic from Event class
fix_logic.rationale: The Event class was acting as a God object, handling its own serialization (CBOR/JSON) and string interpolation. By moving these to EventSerializer and EventInterpolator, we adhere to the Single Responsibility Principle, allowing Event to focus on being a data container.
